title: Amtech G0946 Filler Applicator Kit, 4-Piece Plastic Scraper Set, Lightweight, Reusable and Easy to Clean, Sizes 50, 80, 100, 120mm
features: 4 SIZES: This plastic scraper set includes sizes: 50mm, 80mm, 100mm and 120mm
VERSATILE: Made from tough, flexible plastic, the scrapers can also be used as filling blades
APPLICATIONS: Ideal for many scraping and filling jobs, they are easy to clean for re-use
COMPACT DESIGN: Suitable for confined or hard-to-reach spaces
HOUSEHOLD & PROFESSIONAL USE: Suitable for DIYers and tradespeople alike
description: Product Description The 4-piece plastic scraper tool is ideal for patching, filling, wallpaper removal, and other decorating and DIY tasks around your home. Each scraper is made from flexible plastic for effective all-round usage and they are both lightweight and easy to clean. Reusable and supplied in 4 handy sizes. Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 4pc Plastic Scraper See more
